task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into MedinTux as a practitioner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main MedinTux interface or agenda module is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the calendar is navigated to the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agenda or calendar view is open and explicitly shows the date March 16, 2026 (or 16/03/2026).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient is selected for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'MARTIN Sophie' is entered or selected in the patient field of the appointment creation dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment is scheduled for the correct time and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment start time is set to 10:00 AM and the end time is 10:30 AM (or the duration is explicitly set to 30 minutes).

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment type is set to 'Consultation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment type, category, or label field displays 'Consultation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the reason for the visit is entered and the appointment is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Renouvellement ordonnance diabète' is visible in the notes or reason field, and the appointment appears as a saved block on the calendar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with MedinTux dialog boxes and calendar clicks, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine MedinTux application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the actual MedinTux medical software, not a text editor, mock-up, or generic calendar app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly inserting the appointment into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL or SQLite INSERT commands being executed to create the appointment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires scheduling an appointment in the MedinTux application. Target Patient: MARTIN Sophie (DOB: 1985-03-22). Target Date: Monday, March 16, 2026. Target Time: 10:00 AM. Duration: 30 minutes (10:00 AM - 10:30 AM). Appointment Type: Consultation. Reason: 'Renouvellement ordonnance diabète'.
